goal: Add a side-effect-free request/response contract for a future runtime dry-run execution route, keeping executionAllowed false and avoiding route mount, server changes, orchestrator calls, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, deploy, workflows, or packages.
scope_out: Do not mount or change runtime routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, or change packages.
claims: Runtime execution route shape can be contracted without execution.
Env gate, method, route, confirm, instruction, and preflight readiness are validated.
assumptions: A later mount block may use this contract before any execution implementation.
dod: Ready contract returns 200 with executionAllowed false.
Disabled env, route mismatch, and wrong method are guarded.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime route changes, orchestrator calls, provider calls, DB calls, GitHub calls, writes, deployment, package, workflow, or execution authorization become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-030 preflighted a future execution route. BPK-034 may define the route contract but must not mount it.
